summary: Tested signup button fix - VERIFIED WORKING. The signup flow on web now properly triggers using window.alert() instead of React Native's Alert.alert(). All signup features tested and working: form validation, organization/independent selection, terms checkbox, button enable/disable state, successful signup with database creation, welcome alert shown, redirect to onboarding, and welcome email sent via Resend API.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes on React Native TextInput components are not being rendered in the web DOM - consider adding explicit data-testid to web-specific elements
Console deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow) and expo-av deprecated (migrate to expo-audio/expo-video for SDK 54)
seed_data_creation: Created test user during UI testing - cleaned up by subsequent tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signup button fix verified working. All features tested: 1) Form validation shows window.alert() on web 2) Terms checkbox enables/disables submit button 3) Independent signup creates active user with needs_onboarding=true 4) Org signup creates pending user 5) Welcome email sent via Resend API 6) User redirected to /onboarding after signup

features_verified.signup_form_validation: PASS - Shows alerts for missing required fields
features_verified.organization_selection: PASS - Picker opens, shows independent + org options, selection updates UI
features_verified.terms_checkbox: PASS - Must be checked before submit, toggles button disabled state
features_verified.submit_button_state: PASS - cursor: not-allowed when disabled, pointer when enabled
features_verified.successful_signup: PASS - API returns 200, user created with correct attributes
features_verified.welcome_alert: PASS - window.alert() shows welcome message on successful signup
features_verified.user_in_database: PASS - User persisted with status=active, account_type=independent, needs_onboarding=true
features_verified.welcome_email: PASS - Email sent via Resend API (logged: 72947c6a-0f3e-419d-a5e6-ce56313468f3)

rca_of_the_issue: Original bug: React Native's Alert.alert() doesn't work on web platform - calls silently fail. Fix: Added Platform.OS === 'web' check and used window.alert() for web. Also added type='button' attribute and console logging for debugging.
